title: CMD Kerala Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 02 Project Engineer Posts
description: The Centre for Management Development Kerala (CMD Kerala) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Project Engineer and Urban Designer/ Planner Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Civil Engineering, Post-graduation, MBA can apply for the CMD Kerala Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we hav...
